programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts a special edition, inviting celebrities Robert Rinder, Andrea McLean, Brian McFadden and Denise Robertson to take on a Chaser in order to win thousands of pounds for the Text Santa TV appeal

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: A team of cabin crew colleagues answer Top 10 list questions and attempt to top the Tenable tower to win a big cash prize. Quiz show, hosted by Sally Lindsay

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Nigel Havers hosts as dealers Jo, Adi, Ian, James and Jacqui, JB, Sam and Jon battle each other to buy items brought in by the public. Objects include a dress and umbrella from the London 2012 Paralympics, a night vision periscope from an army tank and a 7ft ice-cream figure from Italy

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Apprentice, Britains Got Talent, Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing, Love Is Blind, Celebrity Puzzling, Alexander Armstrong in India and ITV News about the conflict in Iran

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Another group of curious committed couples explore the possibility of opening up their relationships with sexually liberated residents. In this episode, builder Connor and full-time mother Kirstie are interested in bringing another man into their relationship and want to start the process by having a threesome. However, after connecting with resident Nathan, things go off the rails due to Connors confidence issues. Meanwhile, married parents Chanice and Richardo, who are torn between a threesome or foursome, face an unexpected issue - finding a resident who is attracted to them

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Jamali Maddix, Vittorio Angelone and Penny Mordaunt for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton joins Joe Lycett to assess the wonders of Prague, capital of the Czech Republic. A kayak tour along the River Vltava allows them to take in the key sights, including the castle and the Charles Bridge. They then explore the work of sculptor David Cerný, whose controversial pieces adorn the city. Dinner is served at Levitate, where they eat their way through an 18-course tasting menu, including eating a sausage out of a skull and sampling caviar-laced ice-cream. On day two, the pair enjoy a beer spa before ascending the Zizkov TV Tower, for a birds eye view of the city

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outreach manager Gill and accountant Mark kick off the competition in Glasgow with a night of comforting food and even more comfortable company. On day two, mischievous Derek pushes Matts buttons and ends up being banished from the kitchen. On the final evening, a cooking disaster sees Cat blowing her top, but Martin saves the day

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj restore a 163-year-old derelict chapel on Wales Llyn Peninsula, to turn it into a forever home with a working pottery studio. The pair start renovations on the downstairs Sunday School so it can become their living space, complete with a kitchen, bathroom, bedroom and a snug. But before they can begin they have to rip out the fungus and try to control the dry rot thats infected the chapel

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Aberdeen to help two sets of house hunters who have relocated to the city for work and need to find family homes quickly. Helen Barr and Brian Clarence moved from Essex while awaiting the arrival of their first child and have been living in rented accommodation, but with baby number two on the way, its time to find a family home. However, Brians main priority seems to be finding a bargain, while Helen doesnt want to take on a project. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Kirsten and Scott Laing search for a semi-rural property so they can move their family up from Fife

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca meets her high-school sweetheart and falls for him all over again - but he does not share her fantasies about getting married. Plus, the theft of Sams sports car results in him setting up a victims support group. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars VI - This Time Its for Real
programme.desc: The traditional battle between the Old Towne Tavern and Cheers takes a new turn when the former comes under new management. The regulars feel they may have underestimated the opposition when they discover the nickname of the new owner - The Angel of Death. Harry Guardino guest stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tricks Cliff into thinking that material he has sent to Johnny Carsons The Tonight Show has been accepted - but the joke soon rebounds on the joker. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson, Billy Monger and Dame Sarah Storey present coverage of the opening events on day five of the Games in Italy. Great Britain take on China in the round robin stage of the mixed team wheelchair curling event at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. Plus, para cross-country skiing takes place at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, including the conclusion of Great Britain v China in the round robin stage of the mixed team wheelchair curling event at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. Plus, various para cross-country skiing 10k finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy. The gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling get under way at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. The 10km cross-country skiing events also continue at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, featuring the conclusion of the gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, as the inaugural champions in this discipline are crowned

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Power cuts strike Brian and Paulas new French restaurant, illness hits Jen and Nicks horse charity and delivery delays put back the launch of Jamess coffee bar in Spain

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: Domes by the Sea, Dumfries and Galloway
programme.desc: Brothers John and Andrew throw open the doors of their glampsite, Domes by the Sea, on their family farm in Dumfries and Galloway. The domes seem to be an all-round success, and things get heated with a sauna experience and onsite hot tubs. But will limescale travails and self-check-in sorrow scupper the hosts chances?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in and around Manchester, dental nurse Amy hosts an American-themed dinner party - and shes counting on her grandmas secret rub recipe to bag the £1,000

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day five of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mixed doubles wheelchair curling concluded with the bronze and gold medal matches at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. A number of medals were also up for grabs at in para cross-country skiing at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Mothin Ali MP, deputy leader of the Green Party, sets out the partys plans for more investment in community projects

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help a pair of baptist ministers with their four-bedroom in Alnwick, Northumberland. Having grown up on the same street, Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space for combining work and family needs - including fitting up to 14 people round a dining table. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds star in this drama based on the bestseller by Barbara Taylor Bradford, charting a womans rise from maid to businesswoman. In early 1900s Yorkshire, ambitious maid Emma Harte dreams of escaping Fairley Hall for a better life, but is caught up in a forbidden romance with Edwin Fairley, son of the master of the house. In 1970s New York, the worlds richest woman is warned that a plot is brewing to take away the empire she has worked so hard to build. With Ewan Horrocks, Will Mellor, Leanne Best and Lydia Leonard

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Jodie and Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours, but while one neighbour protests his innocence, the CCTV says otherwise. A child whos been found wandering the streets late at night doesnt want to tell veteran officer Emma who he is. Classically trained singing officer Joe contends with boozed-up Brightonians, including a woman whos reported to have downed a drink and got behind the wheel of a car

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Leanne and Emily arrive at the scene of a car crash and race to catch a suspected dangerous driver who attempts to flee on foot. Ollie and Harry are called to investigate an altercation between housemates. In the centre of town, Petes coppers nose leads him to uncover something entirely unexpected

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Catch Me Daddy (2014)
programme.desc: A girl runs away from her strict Pakistani family so that she can be with her British boyfriend - a move that enrages her father. He sends her violent brother and a group of other men to track his daughter down. Thriller, starring Sameena Jabeen Ahmed, Gary Lewis and Conor McCarron

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and Marj Hogarth set their sights on turning the old school room into their snug. Marj restores a baroque French chair, while fellow Pottery Throw Down judge Rich Miller helps Keith to make brutalist tiles for a feature wall. The couple take a break from forging the chapels future to visit the National Library of Wales to discover Capel Salems fiery past

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help key-workers with modest budgets who want to buy their first homes in London. Civil partners Jo Hendle and Ally Macdonald have high expectations, having rented in Belsize Park, but to make the most of their £200,000 budget they need to move away from the expensive north of the capital to the more affordable south. Meanwhile, Liverpudlian Jennifer Dean hopes that £209,000 will buy her a two-bedroom period property in the south of the capital, with outside space for her cats

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight to uncover four new items, and restorer Ronnie relives his past life on Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Woody and Kellys wedding day arrives, with the pair trying to resist the temptation to consummate their marriage before they say their vows. Meanwhile, Carla predicts nothing but doom and gloom for the happy couple. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. Woody and Kellys wedding day arrives, with the pair trying to resist the temptation to consummate their marriage before they say their vows. Meanwhile, Carla predicts nothing but doom and gloom for the happy couple. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca decides to smarten up her image, but it is not long before her old smoking habit leads to a bar-room blaze. Starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events on day six of the Games in Italy. The alpine skiing giant slalom finals get under way at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, with ParalympicsGBs Menna Fitzpatrick and her guide Katie Guest hoping to be in contention for a medal

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further coverage of day six of the Games in Italy, as the alpine skiing giant slalom finals continue at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. ParalympicsGBs Menna Fitzpatrick is set to be involved and she came into these Games as Great Britains most decorated winter athlete in either the Olympics or Paralympics with six medals

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued coverage of day six of the Games in Italy, as the alpine skiing giant slalom finals conclude at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey then report on the final day of round robin matches in the mixed team wheelchair curling at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, where places in tomorrows medal matches are to be decided

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Debra and Gordon are looking for the perfect holiday home in the southern Spanish city of Torrevieja. This former fishing village has grown to become one of Spains most popular resorts, with acres of beautiful countryside and miles of spectacular coastlines hugging popular towns, villages and resorts. While Debra is keen on apartments, Gordon would love a townhouse for their budget of £120,000. Laura Hamilton shows them a selection of places that satisfy both of their desires, from a sea-view apartment and a property with a gym and a sauna to a tantalising townhouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Holiday host Donna fears that she cannot deliver the luxury stays shes promised in Italy. Theres a housing emergency at Brian and Paulas new French restaurant, and, also in France, Paul and Melissa are put through their paces restoring a once-prestigious hotel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sue hosts the weeks final visit, at her Victorian townhouse BandB, Brooklands Guest House, in Penrith. The vintage decor is a hit with most of the guests, but things turn bittersweet after a marmalade tasting experience when discussion turns to payment day

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the penultimate night in Manchester, cabaret practitioner Vanessa is turning her modest Mancunian semi into a Chicago speakeasy, with home comfort food planned and a side order of illicit hooch. Richard is blown away by Vanessas outfit and its not long before hes accusing Danny of dressing like a Butlins red coat. Amy and Pauline have a snoop around the house and discover a treasure trove of outfits from Vanessas cabaret shows. The evening really takes off when Vanessas alter ego Coco Deville takes to the floor accompanied by a small band and some ostrich feathers. The piña colada crumble amazes Danny and Richard, and the group learn the subtle art of face yoga. Will Vanessas illicit night of burlesque bravado ruffle feathers?

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day six of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Para alpine skiing giant slalom medals were up for grabs at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, and the mixed team curling event reached its final day of round robin fixtures at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Natalie Fleet, MP for Bolsover, sets out the governments vision for tackling the cost of living crisis

programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke meets people who are taking on challenging huge builds for powerful emotional reasons, from being drawn back to an area that theyve always loved or a place with strong family memories to taking on a house thats close to their heart. Young married couple Chris and Ellie have returned to where Chris grew up, in Lancashires Ribble Valley, to build a home together. After months of struggling to find the perfect property, they ended up buying a run-down bungalow from Chriss grandparents - but when it turned out the house wasnt suitable to live in, they began the months-long process of building a new house from scratch

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: As housemaid Emma and young master Edwin fall deeper in love, she struggles to see how they can overcome their class differences. Meanwhile, Adam and Olivia continue their own love affair as Adeles erratic behaviour and paranoia worsen. In the 1970s, 80-year-old Emma reckons with her childrens plan to oust her from the Harte empire - unaware of a secret romance blossoming between her protegee granddaughter Paula and Jim Fairley. Starring Jessica Reynolds and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Fifty-three-year-old motorbike enthusiast Scott is rushed in after crashing at high-speed at a track event, and there are concerns he may have suffered spinal injury. Meanwhile, 74-year-old Peter has potentially life-threatening injuries after being crushed under an eight-ton static caravan and 21-year-old hockey player Lizzie has severely broken her ankle during training and needs a reset

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Roofer Simon is in a critical condition after falling off a two-storey building onto concrete. Major trauma consultant Rory and the team try to assess Simons multiple major injuries and work together to try to save his life. Ninety-seven-year-old Doris is in Resus with a worryingly fast and irregular heart rate, while in the Childrens Emergency department, 20-month-old Evelyn has a burn on her finger from a mozzarella stick

programme.title: Millionaire Hoarders
programme.desc: Car fanatic John decides to part with some of his beloved collection to help fund his retirement. Expert and fellow petrol-head Clive spots two classic cars in Johns collection that could raise a huge sum, but will his gamble on an auction sale pay off? In the West Country, Rachel and Ronnie help Caroline, who inherited an inn from her father but has made the difficult decision to part with some of its weird and wonderful contents in order to invest on the building. Ronnie spots a rare animal pelt that could be the solution to Carolines problems - if he can prove its authentic

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Molly vs the Machines
programme.desc: Documentary about the death of Molly Russell, the 14-year-old who in 2017 took her own life as a result of depression and negative social media content, and her father Ians fight for online safety. The film focuses on what happened to Molly in the lead-up to her tragic death and the broader economic logic behind AI and big tech as it continues to shape, influence and infiltrate peoples lives

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight, where they meet Helen and husband Dave to restore unwanted items including a metal garden bench and an old water feature

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, married couple Paul and Debbie kick off the competition with a menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites. However, engaged couple Angela and John arent impressed by their simple fare and posh couple Kirsty and James find Pauls behaviour even less palatable. Perfectionists Angela and John cook up dishes inspired by their favourite restaurant meals. Finally, Kirsty and James plan an organic, locally sourced menu. At the table theres a lesson in asparagus eating and the hosts get a dose of their own medicine when their guests return their food criticism

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Siobhán McSweeney and judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller present the final, where the three remaining potters create miniature model theatres and take on a tricky throwing technique in their last surprise second challenge. Whose final curtain call will crown them as champion?

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams regulars are enticed away to a new neon-lit bar that comes complete with free food and dancing girls. Woodys marriage seems to be in trouble, and Carla looks for another job. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boozing expertise secures him his dream job as chief beer-taster at a brewery, while Rebecca grows addicted to the bars new slot machine. George Wendt stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams reputation is tested by Henris challenge to decide who is the more accomplished ladies man, and the battle to collect the most telephone numbers turns into an international contest between America and France

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening events on day seven of the Games in Italy, including the start of the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, which will see ParalympicsGBs Neil Simpson go for a medal after winning bronze in this event at the 2023 Lleida World Championships

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Another group of curious committed couples explore the possibility of opening up their relationships with sexually liberated residents. In this episode, builder Connor and full-time mother Kirstie are interested in bringing another man into their relationship and want to start the process by having a threesome. However, after connecting with resident Nathan, things go off the rails due to Connors confidence issues. Meanwhile, married parents Chanice and Richardo, who are torn between a threesome or foursome, face an unexpected issue - finding a resident who is attracted to them

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Jamali Maddix, Vittorio Angelone and Penny Mordaunt for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian and podcaster Adam Buxton joins Joe Lycett to assess the wonders of Prague, capital of the Czech Republic. A kayak tour along the River Vltava allows them to take in the key sights, including the castle and the Charles Bridge. They then explore the work of sculptor David Cerný, whose controversial pieces adorn the city. Dinner is served at Levitate, where they eat their way through an 18-course tasting menu, including eating a sausage out of a skull and sampling caviar-laced ice-cream. On day two, the pair enjoy a beer spa before ascending the Zizkov TV Tower, for a birds eye view of the city

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Outreach manager Gill and accountant Mark kick off the competition in Glasgow with a night of comforting food and even more comfortable company. On day two, mischievous Derek pushes Matts buttons and ends up being banished from the kitchen. On the final evening, a cooking disaster sees Cat blowing her top, but Martin saves the day

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj restore a 163-year-old derelict chapel on Wales Llyn Peninsula, to turn it into a forever home with a working pottery studio. The pair start renovations on the downstairs Sunday School so it can become their living space, complete with a kitchen, bathroom, bedroom and a snug. But before they can begin they have to rip out the fungus and try to control the dry rot thats infected the chapel

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Aberdeen to help two sets of house hunters who have relocated to the city for work and need to find family homes quickly. Helen Barr and Brian Clarence moved from Essex while awaiting the arrival of their first child and have been living in rented accommodation, but with baby number two on the way, its time to find a family home. However, Brians main priority seems to be finding a bargain, while Helen doesnt want to take on a project. Meanwhile, Kirstie helps Kirsten and Scott Laing search for a semi-rural property so they can move their family up from Fife

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca meets her high-school sweetheart and falls for him all over again - but he does not share her fantasies about getting married. Plus, the theft of Sams sports car results in him setting up a victims support group. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars VI - This Time Its for Real
programme.desc: The traditional battle between the Old Towne Tavern and Cheers takes a new turn when the former comes under new management. The regulars feel they may have underestimated the opposition when they discover the nickname of the new owner - The Angel of Death. Harry Guardino guest stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tricks Cliff into thinking that material he has sent to Johnny Carsons The Tonight Show has been accepted - but the joke soon rebounds on the joker. Starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson, Billy Monger and Dame Sarah Storey present coverage of the opening events on day five of the Games in Italy. Plus, para cross-country skiing takes place at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, including the conclusion of Great Britain v China in the round robin stage of the mixed team wheelchair curling event at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. Plus, various para cross-country skiing 10k finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy. The gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling get under way at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. The 10km cross-country skiing events also continue at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further live coverage of day five of the Games in Italy, featuring the conclusion of the gold and bronze medal matches in the mixed doubles wheelchair curling at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, as the inaugural champions in this discipline are crowned

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Power cuts strike Brian and Paulas new French restaurant, illness hits Jen and Nicks horse charity and delivery delays put back the launch of Jamess coffee bar in Spain

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.sub-title: Domes by the Sea, Dumfries and Galloway
programme.desc: Brothers John and Andrew throw open the doors of their glampsite, Domes by the Sea, on their family farm in Dumfries and Galloway. The domes seem to be an all-round success, and things get heated with a sauna experience and onsite hot tubs. But will limescale travails and self-check-in sorrow scupper the hosts chances?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the third night in and around Manchester, dental nurse Amy hosts an American-themed dinner party - and shes counting on her grandmas secret rub recipe to bag the £1,000

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day five of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mixed doubles wheelchair curling concluded with the bronze and gold medal matches at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium. A number of medals were also up for grabs at in para cross-country skiing at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: Mothin Ali MP, deputy leader of the Green Party, sets out the partys plans for more investment in community projects

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help a pair of baptist ministers with their four-bedroom in Alnwick, Northumberland. Having grown up on the same street, Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space for combining work and family needs - including fitting up to 14 people round a dining table. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds star in this drama based on the bestseller by Barbara Taylor Bradford, charting a womans rise from maid to businesswoman. In early 1900s Yorkshire, ambitious maid Emma Harte dreams of escaping Fairley Hall for a better life, but is caught up in a forbidden romance with Edwin Fairley, son of the master of the house. In 1970s New York, the worlds richest woman is warned that a plot is brewing to take away the empire she has worked so hard to build. With Ewan Horrocks, Will Mellor, Leanne Best and Lydia Leonard

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Jodie and Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours, but while one neighbour protests his innocence, the CCTV says otherwise. A child whos been found wandering the streets late at night doesnt want to tell veteran officer Emma who he is. Classically trained singing officer Joe contends with boozed-up Brightonians, including a woman whos reported to have downed a drink and got behind the wheel of a car

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Leanne and Emily arrive at the scene of a car crash and race to catch a suspected dangerous driver who attempts to flee on foot. Ollie and Harry are called to investigate an altercation between housemates. In the centre of town, Petes coppers nose leads him to uncover something entirely unexpected

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: Members of the Coniston Mountain Team are summoned to help a paraglider who has crash-landed at the top of Great How Crag with potentially paralysing neck injuries. Meanwhile, a man has gone missing around the flooded tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Catch Me Daddy (2014)
programme.desc: A girl runs away from her strict Pakistani family so that she can be with her British boyfriend - a move that enrages her father. He sends her violent brother and a group of other men to track his daughter down. Thriller, starring Sameena Jabeen Ahmed, Gary Lewis and Conor McCarron

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and Marj Hogarth set their sights on turning the old school room into their snug. Marj restores a baroque French chair, while fellow Pottery Throw Down judge Rich Miller helps Keith to make brutalist tiles for a feature wall. The couple take a break from forging the chapels future to visit the National Library of Wales to discover Capel Salems fiery past

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help key-workers with modest budgets who want to buy their first homes in London. Civil partners Jo Hendle and Ally Macdonald have high expectations, having rented in Belsize Park, but to make the most of their £200,000 budget they need to move away from the expensive north of the capital to the more affordable south. Meanwhile, Liverpudlian Jennifer Dean hopes that £209,000 will buy her a two-bedroom period property in the south of the capital, with outside space for her cats

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the Isle of Wight to uncover four new items, and restorer Ronnie relives his past life on Ibiza via a three-wheeled trike

programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Woody and Kellys wedding day arrives, with the pair trying to resist the temptation to consummate their marriage before they say their vows. Meanwhile, Carla predicts nothing but doom and gloom for the happy couple. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. Woody and Kellys wedding day arrives, with the pair trying to resist the temptation to consummate their marriage before they say their vows. Meanwhile, Carla predicts nothing but doom and gloom for the happy couple. Comedy, starring Woody Harrelson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca decides to smarten up her image, but it is not long before her old smoking habit leads to a bar-room blaze. Starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the opening events on day six of the Games in Italy. programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Further coverage of day six of the Games in Italy, as the alpine skiing giant slalom finals continue at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. ParalympicsGBs Menna Fitzpatrick is set to be involved and she came into these Games as Great Britains most decorated winter athlete in either the Olympics or Paralympics with six medals

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Continued coverage of day six of the Games in Italy, as the alpine skiing giant slalom finals conclude at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre. Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey then report on the final day of round robin matches in the mixed team wheelchair curling at Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium, where places in tomorrows medal matches are to be decided

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Debra and Gordon are looking for the perfect holiday home in the southern Spanish city of Torrevieja. This former fishing village has grown to become one of Spains most popular resorts, with acres of beautiful countryside and miles of spectacular coastlines hugging popular towns, villages and resorts. While Debra is keen on apartments, Gordon would love a townhouse for their budget of £120,000. Laura Hamilton shows them a selection of places that satisfy both of their desires, from a sea-view apartment and a property with a gym and a sauna to a tantalising townhouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Holiday host Donna fears that she cannot deliver the luxury stays shes promised in Italy. Theres a housing emergency at Brian and Paulas new French restaurant, and, also in France, Paul and Melissa are put through their paces restoring a once-prestigious hotel

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sue hosts the weeks final visit, at her Victorian townhouse BandB, Brooklands Guest House, in Penrith. The vintage decor is a hit with most of the guests, but things turn bittersweet after a marmalade tasting experience when discussion turns to payment day

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the penultimate night in Manchester, cabaret practitioner Vanessa is turning her modest Mancunian semi into a Chicago speakeasy, with home comfort food planned and a side order of illicit hooch. Richard is blown away by Vanessas outfit and its not long before hes accusing Danny of dressing like a Butlins red coat. Amy and Pauline have a snoop around the house and discover a treasure trove of outfits from Vanessas cabaret shows. The evening really takes off when Vanessas alter ego Coco Deville takes to the floor accompanied by a small band and some ostrich feathers. The piña colada crumble amazes Danny and Richard, and the group learn the subtle art of face yoga. Will Vanessas illicit night of burlesque bravado ruffle feathers?

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day six of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. programme.title: George Clarkes Building Home
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke meets people who are taking on challenging huge builds for powerful emotional reasons, from being drawn back to an area that theyve always loved or a place with strong family memories to taking on a house thats close to their heart. Young married couple Chris and Ellie have returned to where Chris grew up, in Lancashires Ribble Valley, to build a home together. After months of struggling to find the perfect property, they ended up buying a run-down bungalow from Chriss grandparents - but when it turned out the house wasnt suitable to live in, they began the months-long process of building a new house from scratch

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: As housemaid Emma and young master Edwin fall deeper in love, she struggles to see how they can overcome their class differences. programme.desc: Ray buys a new vacuum cleaner that is intended to make housework easier for the family, but instead causes friction between Marie and Debra

programme.desc: Joey tells everyone about his upcoming TV appearance, little anticipating the surprise awaiting him, and Ross flirts with a pizza-delivery woman, but leaves her decidedly unimpressed

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a ride in a police car, until the sound of a gunshot causes them to fear for their lives. Meanwhile, Rachel accidentally listens to a telephone message to Ross from Emily. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Gary plans to ask her to move in with him, but fears it is too early in their relationship for such a commitment, and asks Chandler to help her change his mind. While the rest of the gang become obsessed with playing a game of catch. Guest starring Michael Rapaport, with Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joeys Big Break
programme.desc: Joey turns up in Las Vegas to start filming his first movie role, only to receive disappointing news. Phoebe racks her brains to remember why she hates Ross so much

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachels intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: R.I.P.D. (2013)
programme.desc: A cop is murdered in the line of duty by his crooked partner, and ends up recruited by a supernatural police force. Teaming up with a Wild West lawman, he is sent back to Earth to prevent ghosts from causing chaos and uncovers a plot to overrun the land of the living with evil spirits. Fantasy adventure, with Ryan Reynolds and Jeff Bridges

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast the Internet
programme.desc: Iain is joined by Guz Khan, Lara Ricote, Babatunde Aleshe and Lou Wall for a look at baffling online trends, shameless overshares and truly cursed corners of the internet

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Improv comedy show with Colin Mochrie, Ryan Stiles, Jeff Davis, Brad Sherwood and Aisha Tyler and a special appearance by Cheryl Hines

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Bill Nye The Science Guy guests on the comic improv show, with regulars Wayne Brady, Gary Proops, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Aisha Taylor hosts the comic improv show, with Wayne Brady, Keegan-Michael Key, Colin Mochrie and Ryan Stiles

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Jimmy hosts South Park Elementarys first comedy awards ceremony, where he insults the Germans by stating they are the least funny people in the world, prompting them to promise swift and brutal retribution against the school

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: In an episode inspired by the Duke and Duchess of Cambridges wedding, the Prince of Canada prepares to wed his fiancee in a lavish ceremony. However, when the bride is abducted during the event, Canadians all over the world are sent a call to arms, one that is accepted by Kyles little brother Ike

programme.title: MTV Cribs UK
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the lads cook up a storm in London, while internet icon Charity Shop Sue (Selina Mosinski) gives a tour of her Nottingham home

programme.title: Comedy Central Live
programme.desc: A stand-up special inw hich the comedian and actor shows off his self-defence moves, talks about how his mum ruins his game, and what he loves about American TV

programme.title: Kerry Godliman: Bandwidth
programme.desc: A stand-up show by the actress at Londons Comedy Store, covering a range of topics concerning middle-aged life, including wellness, influencers, robots and fashion

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Inappropriate Song
programme.desc: Ross makes Emma laugh by singing Baby Got Back, while Joey and Chandler find an incriminating video in Richards old apartment with a familiar face in a leading role. Phoebe fails to impress her boyfriends parents, who encourage him to date someone else, forcing him to declare his love for her

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Phone Number
programme.desc: Chandler returns from Tulsa to visit Monica, but has to hide from Joey after rejecting his offer of free basketball tickets. Rachel goes out with Phoebe for a night on the town, while Ross and Mike find they have nothing in common

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as hospital receptionists, doing and saying whatever the other guys tell them, and then try to convince strangers to not use a particular restroom

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q play do and say whatever youre told while posing as nurses at a hospital, and then go grocery shopping with their fake wives

programme.desc: Ray and the family attend an open day at the twins school, during which first-grader Michael shocks and embarrasses them by reading out a story obviously based on their constant bickering

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Wild Isles, Rise and Fall, Challenge Anneka, Race Across the World, The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, This Morning and BBC News bulletins. From March 2023

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Bank manager Ross hopes it will be third time lucky as he plays icebreaker games with primary school teacher Sarah-Jayne. Beauty salon owner Kenny is confident he will impress Jess, while sales manager Yemis date looks promising with DJ Chelsea, who shares his love of music. Computer programmer Andrew, who has been single for more than 10 years, meets old-fashioned romantic Sarah

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts a carpentry business, but quickly learns she will need more than mere practical skill if her venture is to succeed. Fearing she will not be taken seriously, she appoints Homer as a figurehead - but he begins taking all the credit for her labours. Meanwhile, Bart is thrilled to discover Principal Skinner has a lethal peanut allergy

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly talks Erica into writing a Hanukkah song for the school holiday concert, inspiring Barry to prove his own musical prowess. Adam discovers that the things he loved as a child arent always as good as he remembers. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly hopes to inspire the students when she takes over as substitute teacher in Barrys chemistry class. Adam accidentally embarrasses Emmy when he is forced to read out a note about her in class, so he enlists Ericas help to become a better friend. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with Chris, who planned a woodland fairy-tale wedding for his heavily pregnant bride Corinne back in 2012. He is joined by best man Alex and bridesmaid Sam to relive the highs lows of the ceremony

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Dillon leans on Lucas for support, and sparks might re-ignite between the former lovers. Elsewhere, a mum confides in her friends at a yoga class

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Theresa pushes Mercedes to give Warren another chance, and a phone call makes Dillon concerned about Lucass wellbeing

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled that he gets to celebrate Christmas now that he is engaged to Lainey. Meanwhile, Murrays brother Marvin makes a promise to Adam with a surprising outcome

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is in her element as she prepares for Barry and Laineys big day. Geoff worries about Adams shortcomings as a wedding videographer, while Barry begins to have second thoughts about the whole thing

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria uses her time with the twins as an opportunity to secretly baptise them before Haley and Dylan get home. Meanwhile, Claire is still dealing with the fallout from the smart closet fiasco, and Cam is at war with his schools mascot - who is threatening his chance at securing a new college coaching job

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchells friends mistakenly assume they have split up, while Haley attempts to cook Thanksgiving dinner as a thank you for Claire and Phils support with the twins. Meanwhile, Phil thinks he has a chance to reclaim his dignity after their first outing 10 years ago went so wrong when Jay invites him and Dylan along to fly his model plane

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to make friends with a new girl at school who turns out to be a terrible bully - prompting her to look for a remedy for antisocial behaviour. Meanwhile, Homer gets into the child safety business

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: First of the two-part finale of the comedy, with Phil and Claire deciding that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again. Meanwhile, as Gloria becomes more successful at work, she notices Jay, Manny and Joe dont seem to need her as much

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach rolls into Porto in Portugal, where tour guide Brendan and the celebs go off-roading on dirt buggies and a new all-star girl band is formed

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is duped into enlisting in the army, and falls foul of a hard-nosed officer who uses him as the target in a training exercise. Escaping back to Springfield with troops in hot pursuit, he makes his way home - where Marges ingenuity saves the day. With the guest voice of Kiefer Sutherland

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe becomes a successful poet with Lisas help, and wins the approval of a group of highbrow authors - but enjoys the limelight so much that he claims all the credit for himself, prompting her to seek revenge

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A new cellmate spells danger for Lucas, forcing Dillon to take desperate measures. Diane and Tony continue to lie to protect their loved ones, and a residents romantic hopes end in betrayal

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates

How will he respond to free spirit Sophia and her palm-reading talents?

programme.title: Naked Attraction

There is also a catch-up with Lauren Harries, celebrated transsexual woman and the first celebrity to appear in a pod, and Josh, who was on the third series, to find out if he is still a virgin

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work more makeover magic. Will helping their homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? With a baby on the way, Krystal and Cam are eager to swap their high-maintenance period property for a property thats ready to live in. But its a battle of convention vs contemporary when the couple cant agree on a dream home. As Drew looks for a compromise, Jonathan gets to work on a costly bathroom construction. Short:Its convention vs contemporary when Krystal and Cam cant agree on a dream home. While Drew looks for a compromise, Jonathan works on costly constructions

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wirth - the CEO of a California ski resort - goes undercover to learn more about his companys working practices as he prepares to merge an existing operation with a new acquisition

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues to uncover problems at the Juniper Hill Inn in Windsor, Vermont. The chef tries to help the staff communicate with owners Robert and Ari, but after he catches one of them telling a shocking lie, will it be the final straw?

Mum is horrified to see it again, but her spouse is in his element and cant stop playing with Lord Luck. Unfortunately Dad is a terrible ventriloquist, and it seems that Lord Luck only knows two words - ones not to be repeated in polite company. Meanwhile, Jonnys friend, Ben is coming for dinner. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Kat Cole goes undercover among the workforce of her company Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from more than 900 bakeries in 40 countries worldwide. Kat has come a long way after being raised by a single mother who fed her family of three girls on $10 a week. She seeks advice from her old boss, former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks, who also went undercover, in his own organisation. Kat has some lofty goals for Cinnabon to become a worldwide food brand, and wants to make sure that the new products she has put in place are working before she implements her plans

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, its time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarahs evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. programme.desc: Randy DeWitt, the CEO and co-founder of bar and grill chain Twin Peaks, goes undercover to find out whether the companys culture is keeping up with its rapid growth. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

There is also a catch-up with Lauren Harries, celebrated transsexual woman and the first celebrity to appear in a pod, and Josh, who was on the third series, to find out if he is still a virgin

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Great Expectations, Rise and Fall, Wild Isles, Dance 100, Tempting Fortune, Married at First Sight Australia and Project Icon: The UKs Next Music Star. They also watch the news coverage of an asteroid passing between the Earth and the moon. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Halloween-inspired tales featuring the all-American family. Springfield becomes the target of an alien invasion and Homer is transformed into a gigantic jelly-like creature, rampaging through the town and leaving a trail of destruction in his wake. Featuring the guest voice of Dr Phil

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. Beverly finds Ericas college application, in which she praises her mother as her hero, but Erica is far from pleased about it. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to join the school tennis team in order to stay close to his best friend Chad. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentines Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Danielle and Jordan pull no punches as they go head to head with best man Adam and bridesmaid Laura to relive their knockout, boxing-themed wedding from 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is impending chaos in the air when Jay holds a Super Bowl party at the same time as Claire is hosting Haleys baby shower - both events being in Jays house

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchell learn that Lilly has started her periods, so they call in reinforcements to give her advice. Phil tells Luke he recently attended a prenatal class with Haley

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adams dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellors brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises hes neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphy house is bursting at the seams when Dylans hippie mom moves in and Claires lonely stepdad Jerry wants to pay them a visit, too. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria attempt to help Manny get over his big break-up with Sherry

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wins a once-in-a-lifetime safari trip to Africa. However, when Homer enrages a hippo at a Masai party, the jaunt soon becomes an adventure, involving a trip over the Victoria Falls in a ceremonial shield, a carnivorous plant, coconut Molotov cocktails and a chimp refuge thats not all that it seems

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The same day is shown from three different perspectives as Bart is pursued by gangsters, Lisa makes a bid to win the school science fair with a talkative robot, and Marge accidentally slices off Homers thumb. Featuring the guest voices of Frankie Muniz and Joe Mantegna

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the American comedy following the lives of three branches of an extended family, featuring Jay, a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, and gay couple Mitchell and Cam, who are getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Ice-Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: Homer is fired from the power plant and secures a job as an ice-cream man, but gets so wrapped up in his new career that he puts his marriage in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Marge discovers a new skill as an expert sculptor, using an unusual medium - lollipop sticks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and havent given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: The Good, the Bad and the Kinky
programme.desc: Another romp through the Naked Attraction archive, this time focusing on the people doing the choosing - from those that it seemed butter would not melt to the ones who revealed their darkest secrets. Highlights include the polyamorous couple picking a date to the time the bodies were covered in whipped cream, strawberries and custard

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides hes only suitable for nerd roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Ericas life

programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable sky high wedding in 2016

programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jays annual hiking trip to find an elusive eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him, while Alex, Claire and Haley plan a baby shower

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining amateur cooks tart-making abilities are put to the test in the third round of the competition. Their first task is to bake a tarte Tatin, with judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry looking for intriguing flavour combinations to tickle their tastebuds. The hopefuls then face another daunting technical challenge as they try to replicate Marys seemingly straightforward recipe for treacle tart, but the delicate task of adding a lattice top leaves some contestants flummoxed. Finally, they try to create an ornate fruit tart fit for gracing the window display of a leading patisserie - before discovering the identities of the latest Star Baker and the person who will be heading home. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants dessert-making skills. The hopefuls start by creating tortes before tackling this weeks technical test - the delicate French dish of creme caramel. Though these two rounds provide a stern examination of the amateurs creative flair and technical ability, they then face possibly the toughest task of the series so far - a six-hour challenge to create a show-stopping layered meringue. Once the sugar has set, who will be this weeks Star Baker, and who will be going home? Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining contestants pie-making skills are put to the test in a trio of demanding tasks. First, the hopefuls try to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry by making beef Wellington, before creating hand-raised pies during this rounds technical challenge - but several of the cooks run into difficulties as they try to work with a pastry dolly for the first time. Finally, the showstopper challenge sees traditional American pies being prepared - before one more baker is eliminated from the competition. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The pressure continues to rise as the contestants pudding-making skills face a stern examination. Their first task involves creating a pair of sponge dishes, before Mary Berry sets the latest technical challenge - recreating her recipe for the meringue-topped dessert queen of puddings. Finally the cooks try to get to grips with the intricacies of baking strudel in the showstopper round - before one of them leaves the competition for good. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward for a tour of Mid Wales. They begin at a cider-tasting, which James uses to dish up some cider-infused apple fritters. Gareth discovers a farm where the Wagyu cattle fed on local beer. Away from the culinary activities, Gareth is challenged to a rally car ride and James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of Sardinia, starting out in Cagliari, where everyone is in high spirits for the feast of St Efisio. The bikers join in by cooking a local speciality, almond and orange cakes. They also meet the tuna fishermen of Carloforte and a chef who has a special way of serving up platters of the fish, are shown how to make sheeps black pudding by a group of shepherds and are served a stew by the King of Sardinia

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 10 remaining amateur cooks tart-making abilities are put to the test in the third round of the competition. Their first task is to bake a tarte Tatin, with judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry looking for intriguing flavour combinations to tickle their tastebuds. The hopefuls then face another daunting technical challenge as they try to replicate Marys seemingly straightforward recipe for treacle tart, but the delicate task of adding a lattice top leaves some contestants flummoxed. Finally, they try to create an ornate fruit tart fit for gracing the window display of a leading patisserie - before discovering the identities of the latest Star Baker and the person who will be heading home. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants dessert-making skills. The hopefuls start by creating tortes before tackling this weeks technical test - the delicate French dish of creme caramel. Though these two rounds provide a stern examination of the amateurs creative flair and technical ability, they then face possibly the toughest task of the series so far - a six-hour challenge to create a show-stopping layered meringue. Once the sugar has set, who will be this weeks Star Baker, and who will be going home? Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nellie Oleson snubs Laura and Mary for wearing homespun dresses on their first day at school, so Caroline teaches her sister how to win the bullys friendship

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A hailstorm leaves the Ingalls familys crops in ruin. To recoup the money, Charles and some friendly neighbours - including a light-hearted Englishman - work in a dangerous railroad blasting job. The Englishman, who is employed as a powder-monkey brings both cheer and eventually tragedy to Charles. Caroline, meanwhile, rounds up the farmers wives to salvage whats left of the crops, despite the pessimism that threatens their effort

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: While in Mankato, Charles encounters a drunken Mr Edwards in the midst of a bar fight and brings him to Walnut Grove. To rehabilitate him, he gets him a job at Hansens Mill, and Caroline tries to set him up with widow Grace Snider

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A famous evangelist comes to town, and Olivia hopes the family will let him baptise them. However, John does not approve of the preachers outlook on religion

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy reads Adolf Hitlers book Mein Kampf, and causes uproar when he plans to publish excerpts in the newspaper so the townsfolk will be aware of what is happening in the world

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Emma steals Niamhs car in a fit of rage, while Siobhan shocks Brendan with her plans for a water birth, but decides to go through with it anyway. Light-hearted drama, starring Deirdre Donnelly and Gary Whelan

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: A fortune-teller creates a stir in Ormston, Eddie keeps a vigil at Jeans bedside after she collapses, and Phyllis is shocked to hear a man has been killed in an accident. Elsewhere, Deborah struggles to get Tom on his own to tell him her news, and Aggie cant resist bringing up the past when an offer of a bed for the night solves her homelessness problem. Starring James Bolam and Michael French

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: Janets maternal instincts are aroused by the discovery of a day-old baby abandoned on the doorstep of Arden House. Medical drama, with Annette Crosbie and David Rintoul

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The crusty barrister visits an old friend while defending a young woman accused of selling cannabis to an undercover policeman. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar rescues a lamb destined for the spit at a Greek-style feast, conning Henry into giving it a medical discharge and passage back to America, but the celebrations go ahead without the main ingredient when Trapper and Hawkeye come up with a new recipe using tinned meat

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank Burns cracks under the relentless pressure of endless incoming casualties and an attack on the camp, and pops the question to Hot Lips. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry caters for the pastoral needs of the 4077th with a Shirley Temple film, a barbecue and a sex education lecture, prompted by Hawkeye and Trapper. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff, Larry Linville and Wayne Rogers

programme.title: M*A*S*H (1970)
programme.desc: American battlefield surgeons embark on a campaign of drinking, womanising and practical jokes in an attempt to alleviate the horror of the Korean War.
