programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-olds finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Saving Country Houses with Penelope Keith
programme.desc: In Northamptonshire, Nova Guest has decided to get to grips with Ashby Manors expansive parkland, and restore the views to the original vision of architect Edwin Lutyens. At Mapperton House, valuable tapestries are brought out for conservation. The staff at Chillingham Castle, Northumberland, explain the challenges of working for lifelong collector Sir Humphry Wakefield, who keeps buying new items and antiques

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 21-year-old woman on her first trip to London from Northern Ireland appears to be experiencing kidney failure, and medics fear she could be at risk of a cardiac arrest. A man in a critical condition after falling 20ft from a balcony is brought in by helicopter, and a 34-year-old who fell off her platform shoes while dancing is treated for a deep gash on her forehead

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-olds finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. Matt Tebbutt tries to solve the age-old mystery of how to get ketchup out of the bottle smoothly, while Kate Quilton checks Marmites TV advert claims that a DNA test can predict whether people are more likely to love it or hate it

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The campers visit Tyn-yr-Onnen farm on the edge of Snowdonia National Park, where hosts Len and Helen encourage them to embrace farm life, from feeding animals to picking mushrooms

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find, fix and flog a huge range of possessions they unearth in Britains barns and garages, to make money for their owners. In this episode, they celebrate Henrys birthday with some serious finds in Wensleydale in Yorkshire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Janine and Mark from Stockport, Greater Manchester, are hoping to find their perfect holiday home around the western Dordogne region in France. Married for 20 years and with two grown-up children, they feel now is the right time to buy their dream home in their favourite holiday spot. Laura Hamilton tries to deliver their dreams on their budget of £230,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Painter, decorator and security guard Michelle is the first host in south London. However, the heat really is on as she hits rocky waters with her first ever attempt at a vegan dish as part of her pineapple paradise menu. Events manager Rory is disappointed that some of the food is shop-bought, while Nesha, also an events manager, struggles to enjoy the warm pineapple. Not all hope is lost, though, as sales manager Mike loves it all - at least, thats what he tells Michelle

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The diners get dressed up as celebrities as sales manager Mike, in full Elvis gear, hosts the second evening in south London and serves up three courses of Caribbean cuisine

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: After two raucous evenings, hippy hairdresser Staar aims to chill her guests out with meditation, crystals and a menu of vegan dishes, hoping her earth mother vibes will put her in pole position

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The weeks dinner parties continue to be served in south London. After the chilled-out vibes of Staars dinner the previous evening, Nesha is keen to up the energy levels and deliver on the high standards of cooking she has been promoting all week. Confident, she goes all-out for her guests, but will it be enough to get her hands on the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night of the fun and games in south London and events manager Rorys turn to host with an Asian-themed menu and a glam-it-up dress code. Competitive sales manager Mike is sure hes in the top spot, but Rory knows his biggest threat is other events manager Nesha - who has been a constant critic over the week. Vegan hippy hairdresser Starr has suffered a rough ride with the food shes been served this week and tonights no exception when her dessert is a disaster

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week comes from Jockhedge Holiday Cottages in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, where owner Karen Cumberlidge and her son Liam hope to wow their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Victoria Inn in Witton-le-Wear, County Durham, where someone gets locked in a bathroom and bed springs leave one couple facing a battle

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit of the week, husband and wife Aidan and Mij Nattrass welcome their rivals to the Earlston House Hotel in Paignton, Devon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Beach House in Portland, Dorset, where Pete Lacey feels his back-to-basics approach offers his guests good value. But things get heated with the radiator in Karen and Liams room and opinions are laid bare over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Karen and Liam are shocked by their payment from Pete, while Carolynne and George want to find out what caused Karen and Liam to lose sleep at their place

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend take on Andys Ford Pop hot rod, a 1950s car thats jam-packed with modifications - all of which, sadly, are bent, broken or riddled with rust

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend fix up one of the most iconic cars to come out of Germany, a BMW E30 Alpina. Its Mazs pride and joy but his ill health has prevented him from getting it back on the road

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: The Bearsly-Young family try to fit in husky-cross Elly, Annika and Evie try to tame stressball Bunji and pocket rocket Raff leaps into Dave and Shelleys home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Zimbabwean-born Davi and Matt from Australia, who are determined to create a home to reflect their backgrounds, so set out to build a house in the Chess Valley with a radical multicultural design, which is especially daring for their commuter-belt suburb. Despite their inexperience and the technical difficulty of the steeply sloping site, Davi and Matt manage the venture themselves. But its not long before the problems begin

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets college deputy principal Danny who plans on building a four-bedroom house in his garden in North Lincolnshire. He plans to build a stylish, sustainable but affordable home among the trees with dramatic bedroom pods raised on steel stilts on the edge of a fishing pond to help his three children connect to nature. With plenty of ambition but no experience as a self-builder, his £300,000 budget doesnt seem to match the scale of his project

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Emer Sutherland helps treat an eight-year-old who has fallen 8ft onto concrete while riding his BMX, losing his front teeth and possibly injuring his head and spine. A 19-year-old motorcyclist who hit a bollard requires urgent treatment on his leg, which may otherwise need to be amputated, and X-rays of a stabbing victim yield startling results

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. A 71-year-old with terminal cancer is brought in with breathing difficulties and a decision must be made about whether to resuscitate her if her condition worsens. Meanwhile, a 12-year-old translates for his Brazilian grandmother and a five-year-old has her head wound stitched

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics plan to take a woman who is in the advanced stages of labour to hospital, but when her waters suddenly break, they have to think again. A diabetic man has a painful urine infection, and a 14-month-old is choking and wont feed. A woman collapses at home and needs help getting up, but her daughter is more worried about her increasing confusion

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Emer Sutherland helps treat an eight-year-old who has fallen 8ft onto concrete while riding his BMX, losing his front teeth and possibly injuring his head and spine. A 19-year-old motorcyclist who hit a bollard requires urgent treatment on his leg, which may otherwise need to be amputated, and X-rays of a stabbing victim yield startling results

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. A 71-year-old with terminal cancer is brought in with breathing difficulties and a decision must be made about whether to resuscitate her if her condition worsens. Meanwhile, a 12-year-old translates for his Brazilian grandmother and a five-year-old has her head wound stitched

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations, with Jimmy Doherty heading to South Africa on the trail of sweet piquante peppers and visits the company that has exclusive rights to grow, process and market these colourful chillies. Kate Quilton is in Hawaii to investigate the potentially dangerous levels of mercury in tuna, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why the bags of ice cubes in supermarkets are so crystal clear

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping critics penultimate stop is at Mynydd Derwydd, a wild camping site on the edge of Clocaenog Forest in south-west Wales. With 250 acres of stunning scenery to explore, but next to no facilities, campsite owner Llyr tries to win them over with a bushcraft skills workshop, a lamb barbecue and a breakfast delivery of fresh farm produce

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items lost in peoples homes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: In and around Los Alcázares on Spains Costa Cálida, Craig Rowe pulls out all the stops to find Diane and John from Derbyshire their dream holiday home. Theyve holidayed in this part of the world many times, and have decided that now is the right time to buy their very own property there. The pair have a maximum budget of £180,000 for Craig to work with

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stylist Felicia is the first host for a week of parties in south London, throwing a fashion-themed gathering with a red carpet, a trendy dress code, and a chilli-infused menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in south London is musician and poet Bernard, whose culinary trip around the world comprises an Italian starter, a Colombian main and a very boozy Japanese pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: TV editor Joe hosts a 1990s evening and is keen to make sure his guests are won over by his humble style as much as his food. But scorched potatoes may wipe the smile off his face

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Next to take up the reins in south London is video director Dean, who plans to knock the socks off his guests with his easy-going ways and a tried-and-tested menu. Whether his fiery prawn saganaki will slay his guests sensitive taste buds and his espresso martini brownies please a tough crowd remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In south London, the final host of the week, yoga teacher and masseuse Helen, serves up a Thai-inspired menu and a zen yoga-themed night for her guests. Helen has struggled with the spicy food served thus far, so decides to bring down the heat and serve up some fruity and fragrant dishes instead

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Bowling Green in Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Manchester, where owner Mark Canny hopes his newly refurbished rooms and head for hosting will secure him success. Guests James and Fiona rave about their room, but Martin and Petra find a few furnishing faults. At dinner, Mark gets his guests giggling, while Andrew and Qidis revelation that theyre big hitters in the five-star hotel world sends everyones expectations sky high. In the morning, Marks Irish breakfast gratifies the guests, but a fridge feud leaves him far from chilled

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man whos having a heart attack but thinks hes just pulled a muscle. He has no history of cardiac issues, but an examination confirms that his heart is blocked. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. In paediatric AandE, it is hoped that 18-month-old Charlies urine test results will explain why he has been feeling unwell for five days, while 81-year-old Ronald prepares for a CT scan after suffering a suspected stroke that is affecting his speech

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gins recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

At Mapperton House, valuable tapestries are brought out for conservation. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 21-year-old woman on her first trip to London from Northern Ireland appears to be experiencing kidney failure, and medics fear she could be at risk of a cardiac arrest. A man in a critical condition after falling 20ft from a balcony is brought in by helicopter, and a 34-year-old who fell off her platform shoes while dancing is treated for a deep gash on her forehead

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ninety-three-year-old Ernest is brought in with life-threatening injuries after being knocked down by a hit-and-run driver just outside the hospital. He goes into cardiac arrest, and a consultant must keep his heart going manually in a bid to save his life. Meanwhile, an 83-year-olds finger is mangled by a machine at his metal-working business, and a 51-year-old man with learning difficulties is treated after collapsing, prompting his elderly mother to wonder how he will eventually cope after her death

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations, including Jimmy Doherty visiting Spain to find out how much orange goes into squash. programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The campers visit Tyn-yr-Onnen farm on the edge of Snowdonia National Park, where hosts Len and Helen encourage them to embrace farm life, from feeding animals to picking mushrooms

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: The weeks dinner parties continue to be served in south London. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the last night of the fun and games in south London and events manager Rorys turn to host with an Asian-themed menu and a glam-it-up dress code. programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Zimbabwean-born Davi and Matt from Australia, who are determined to create a home to reflect their backgrounds, so set out to build a house in the Chess Valley with a radical multicultural design, which is especially daring for their commuter-belt suburb. programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets college deputy principal Danny who plans on building a four-bedroom house in his garden in North Lincolnshire. programme.title: The Invention of Surgery
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Human Body
programme.desc: Exploring the history of surgery from its rudimentary conception centuries ago up to the modern specialist procedures that take place today. Part one of two

programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Legendary Battles
programme.sub-title: The Siege of Orleans, Joan of Arcs Victory
programme.desc: The Siege of Orleans, the most striking event in the Hundred Year War. It proved a turning point in the conflict between France and England

programme.desc: Part two of two. programme.title: Besieged Fortresses, Legendary Battles
programme.sub-title: The Siege of Alesia, Caesars Greatest Victory
programme.desc: The Battle of Alesia, contested in 52 BC towards the end of the Gallic wars, in which Roman forces under the command of Julius Caesar besieged Alesia, within which sheltered a confederation of Gallic tribes united under the leadership of Vercingetorix of the Arverni. After six years of fighting, almost 200 000 warriors came together on the plain. One of the greatest battles in Antiquity was about to commence

programme.desc: Drew Pritchard delves into the history of print on Londons Fleet Street. Plus, in Devon, he indulges his passion for architectural salvage

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: City-dwelling families, couples and individuals set out to find their ideal rural retreats with the help of a property expert

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Big changes are afoot for Drew Pritchard in Conwy. He hunts for fresh stock in a stunning 1730s Sussex mansion, and in Lincoln spots an unusual 19th-century medical cabinet

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: In Fulham, Drew prepares to spend big with some elite dealers. In Hastings, Drew and Tee unearth some unusual Chinese watercolours and a Turkish rug

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charles Hanson and Margie Cooper are pitted against each other as they travel across the UK in search of bargains. Their last leg starts in the village of Stickney, Lincolnshire, and leads the duo to the final auction in Leicester

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Philip Serrell embark on another trip, travelling through the Lake District and West Yorkshire before ending at their first auction in Cleveleys, Lancashire

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and his team of experts meet Liz from Dorset who brings in a crumbling cast-iron gate built by her brother as a gift for her and her late husband. Horologist Steve Fletcher and leather expert Suzie Fletcher are brought a century-old watch by Nancy whos father was awarded the watch for his bravery on his return from the First World War. Upholsterer Sonnaz Nooranvary takes on a rocking chair that has been at the heart of Annas family home for decades and is in desperate need of some TLC. Last into the shop is Ruth and her Auntie Roz who bring in a penny arcade game from the 1920s

programme.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programme.desc: Irita helps a grieving daughter clear her late fathers collection of antique bottles. Then, she helps a retired couple fund a holiday of a lifetime

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help more people reunite with long-lost relatives. Phyllis and Kevin Haran fought in vain to get their son back through the courts after putting him up for adoption when they were homeless, jobless and desperate to put their babys interests first. The other story follows 64-year-old Michael ONeil in his search for his birth mother

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell present two stories of people searching for missing relatives who were found much closer than they could ever have imagined. Pauline Pedder was looking for the daughter who she put up for adoption 50 years ago, while Donna Cowell wanted to find out what happened to her younger brother

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus helps a lady part with her late husbands cherished medals. And a well-travelled woman sells her quirky items to fund a trip of a lifetime

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus uncovers an unopened bottle of 1940s whisky and some Victorian Christmas crackers. At auction its chocks away for an old cabin crew uniform

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott cruise into Oxfordshire, where they both opt for items with an art nouveau flavour. Away from the search, Irita learns about Britains only female Nobel prize winner in chemistry, while Raj visits a Bristol table tennis club

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian, presenter and actor Matt Lucas had an exceptionally close bond with his late grandmother, Margot, who came to the UK in 1939 as a Jewish refugee from Nazi Germany. Matt has never fully understood what Margot experienced as a young woman in Berlin in the lead up to the Second World War - or what became of the extended family she left behind. Matts poignant journey takes him to Berlin, and then to Amsterdam where he discovers an extraordinary connection to Anne Frank, as well as the fate of his many family members who had fled to Holland, which was later was invaded by the Germans

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Richard Osman delves into his Brighton roots and is astonished to discover how his four-times great grandfather turned amateur sleuth and ended up entangled in one of the citys most notorious murder trials. The quiz show presenter, TV producer and crime writer also investigates his grandfathers army career and learns why it gave him a profound belief in the power of education, which he passed on to his grandson

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: A regrettable graveyard photoshoot leaves Marnie with a dark attachment. The team need to act quickly to rid her of the evil spirit before its too late

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: An action-packed investigation that leaves Simon and the teams minds blown when the terrifying evidence points to a dark and murderous past

programme.title: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Comedian, presenter and actor Matt Lucas had an exceptionally close bond with his late grandmother, Margot, who came to the UK in 1939 as a Jewish refugee from Nazi Germany. Matt has never fully understood what Margot experienced as a young woman in Berlin in the lead up to the Second World War - or what became of the extended family she left behind. Matts poignant journey takes him to Berlin, and then to Amsterdam where he discovers an extraordinary connection to Anne Frank, as well as the fate of his many family members who had fled to Holland, which was later was invaded by the Germans

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Richard Osman delves into his Brighton roots and is astonished to discover how his four-times great grandfather turned amateur sleuth and ended up entangled in one of the citys most notorious murder trials. programme.desc: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems, gig stories and requests from a music community with attitude.

programme.title: Wish Me Luck
programme.desc: Philippe makes the ultimate sacrifice to help his Resistance colleagues

programme.title: Riders
programme.desc: First in a two-part adaptation of Jilly Coopers racy novel about love, lust and rivalry in the ritzy world of international showjumping. Michael Praed and Marcus Gilbert star as the riders who have been bitter enemies since childhood _ and are now competing for women and the chance to become champions of the equestrian world. With Stephanie Beacham, Anthony Valentine and Caroline Harker

programme.title: Stereo Underground

programme.title: Nationwide
programme.desc: Anne Cassin continues the celebration of National Tree Week with a look at an arts project dedicated to the precious and fragile environment of the forests overlooking Dublin city and what they mean to the many people who explore them every day. Also, reporter Zainab Boladale joins members of the Stepping Stone Forests project, a grassroots movement responsible for planting native woodlands across Dublin

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Priya is concerned for Ravis mental wellbeing, but Ravi heads to the gym to avoid her questioning. In the cafe, Ross tries to reassure Vicki of her safety, but their mood is soured when Mark arrives and chastises them both for getting involved. Peter supports Lauren as she prepares for her first day as manager of the car lot, but she is upset to learn that Max intends to run the business

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Eva shows how to impress without stress, creating black sesame yuzu tart, a striking dessert that balances nutty and citrus flavours beautifully. She then serves up hoisin ribs with slaw, paired with a crisp, tangy salad, followed by prawn and Thai basil yuk sung, a fun dish where dinner party guests can build their own flavour-packed parcels

programme.title: Nevens Ulster Food Tour
programme.desc: Neven Maguire starts his day at the Armagh Observatory and Planetarium with tours and outreach officer RokNe?i?, who takes the chef on a tour of the observatory. At the family-run Armagh Cider Company, Neven enjoys his first ever cider tasting with Philip Troughton - owner of the company. Also, Neven visits Scopers Restaurant in Dundrum, County Down, and chats about the food scene in the North with Chef Paul Cunningham

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: All That Remains with Niall Breslin
programme.desc: The rugby player-turned-academic and mental health advocate sets out on an emotional quest to remember more than 1,300 people buried in unmarked graves in the grounds of the former St Lomans psychiatric hospital in his native Mullingar. He uncovers stories of adults and children who were committed, died and buried under numbered metal crosses without names. Today, even those crosses have been removed. He explores the burial practices of patients unclaimed after death and investigates how many more institutional graveyards there are like this around the country - and what can be done to respect and protect them

programme.title: Goodman: Too Big to Fail
programme.desc: From sudden collapse to improbable comeback - the concluding part of the documentary reveals how Larry Goodman fought his way through financial ruin, political firestorms and public controversy to reclaim his empire and his seat at the head of the table

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Its July 1969 and everyone is giddy with nervous excitement about Apollo 11s imminent landing on the Moon. The whole community wishes to mark this special occasion, and there is a public showing of the landing outside, using the Nonnatus House television set. Trixie makes a mistake with far-reaching consequences while overseeing Joyces latest assignment, and Nancy delves into her familys past

programme.title: Irelands Fittest Family
programme.desc: The grand finale comes from the Tower and Treetop Walk of Avondale in County Wicklow. The remaining families battle it out in the hope of winning the 15,000 euros prize and claiming the title of Irelands Fittest Family 2025. Theyre suspended 20 meters above the forest floor on a see-through platform while holding a plank, pitted against each other in a shuttle race from hell, and much more

programme.desc: Hoteliers Francis and John Brennan help owners develop their hospitality businesses, nurturing four of them over the past two years through the most challenging period ever faced by the industry. One gets to enjoy a luxurious pampered sauna on a boat in the middle of the city, while the other pedals their way down the worlds longest cycle tunnel

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Lauren desperately tries to prove herself by selling a classic car, and when a thug attacks her, Mark rushes to Laurens aid. Vicki asks Phil for help, and Oscar leads a smear campaign on Ian at the request of Elaine. However, Beale soon rumbles their plan

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: As Pete desperately tries to track down the missing photos, a guilty Doug denies all knowledge. The new practice nurse turns out to be all too familiar to Max. Georgies ham-fisted attempt to broker peace between Lily and Gwen blows up in his face. Hayley schemes to turn the tables on Holly and force her to falsify a statement against Mondo

programme.title: Scannal
programme.desc: A look back at a mid-19th-century murder trial that still arouses great interest today. In September 1852, Maria Kirwan was found floating in a remote inlet on Irelands Eye, just off the coast of Howth, County Dublin. Her husband William was found guilty of killing her - but many believe his conviction was due to the moral reaction of society, when it was discovered he had been living with his mistress at the time. Lawyers, writers and experts assess whether or not justice was served

programme.desc: Lauren desperately tries to prove herself by selling a classic car, and when a thug attacks her, Mark rushes to Laurens aid. Vicki asks Phil for help, and Oscar leads a smear campaign on Ian at the request of Elaine. However, Beale soon rumbles their plan

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: As Pete desperately tries to track down the missing photos, a guilty Doug denies all knowledge. The new practice nurse turns out to be all too familiar to Max. Georgies ham-fisted attempt to broker peace between Lily and Gwen blows up in his face. Hayley schemes to turn the tables on Holly and force her to falsify a statement against Mondo

programme.title: Scannal
programme.desc: A look back at a mid-19th-century murder trial that still arouses great interest today. In September 1852, Maria Kirwan was found floating in a remote inlet on Irelands Eye, just off the coast of Howth, County Dublin. Her husband William was found guilty of killing her - but many believe his conviction was due to the moral reaction of society, when it was discovered he had been living with his mistress at the time. Lawyers, writers and experts assess whether or not justice was served

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An ambitious couple set out to build a revolutionary eco home in the Cotswolds, which will not only use very little energy, it will also produce four times the energy it needs. Environmental consultant Duncan is planning to manage the project himself, moving out of the London home he shares with solicitor Liz to live near the site. But although he is totally committed, he has never faced anything like this before, and almost inevitably the technically complex 18-month build, while living apart takes its toll on the couple

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal OHanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Glamorous pharmacy technician Mim is paired with engineer Jack but the odds appear stacked against him - until he reveals he drives a BMW. Esther from Arklow is looking from compassion and cuddles, and hopes that Liam from Dublin may be just the man for her, while Polish born bus driver Marcin from Inchicore dreams of big love with a guy just like himself. But will he find it with his big, bald, bearded doppelganger Cavan, a rugby player from Laois?

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. programme.title: Game of Thrones

Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is pleased to find Carmela has heard intimate details of Juniors love life and quickly realises he could use them to his advantage, leading to a not-so-friendly game of golf between nephew and uncle. Meanwhile, one of Meadows classmates attempts suicide, resulting in a startling revelation about the schools soccer coach

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tonys henchmen kill a Colombian drug dealer doing business on their patch, resulting in a tidy profit for the Soprano crew. Christopher takes girlfriend Adriana to New York for dinner, where they meet gangsta rapper Massive Genius, who is interested in a rendezvous with Tonys friend Hesh. Drama, starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Kendall and the Waystar team find themselves working together at the annual shareholders meeting, where Logans health takes a turn. Starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession

programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men

In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Drama following the exploits of various guests and employees at the tropical White Lotus resort over the course of a week. In the opening episode, tensions quickly arise between the hotel staff and the volatile vacationers that have recently arrived at the resort. Rachel approaches Nicole for advice, Paula and Olivia lose track of their stash, while a revived Mark attempts to connect with Quinn. Starring Murray Bartlett and Connie Britton

programme.title: The White Lotus

programme.title: The Wire

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony believes Big Pussy is an informant, and gives Paulie the task of uncovering the truth. Junior conspires with Livia when he suspects his nephew is plotting against him

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is numbed by an increased dose of antidepressants, until he sees a beautiful stranger in his neighbours yard. Junior sends two hitmen to kill his nephew and AJ is stressed over a formal dance. Crime drama, starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray, Ani and Paul draw closer to the killer, while struggling to keep a lid on their own messy problems. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray, Ani and Paul take precautionary measures to elude detection and untangle a dark mystery, while Frank deals with the fallout of his betrayal. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective

Thriller, starring Vince Vaughn, Colin Farrell and Rachel McAdams

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Great War and Modern Memory
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young Arkansas boy and his sister in 1980 triggers vivid memories and enduring questions for retired detective Wayne Hays, who worked the case 35 years before with partner Roland West. Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology, starring Mahershala Ali, Stephen Dorff and Carmen Ejogo

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays looks back at the aftermath of the 1980 Purcell case, including possible evidence left behind at an outdoor hangout for local kids. As attention focuses on two conspicuous suspects, the parents of the missing children receive a cryptic note

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays recalls the early days of his romance with Amelia, and some of the cracks that began to show after they married and had children together. Back in the present day, ten years after the Purcell crimes took place, Hays is presented with a second chance to vindicate himself and the investigation

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: West and Hays think they may have found a connection between the local church and the Purcell crimes, and Woodard finds himself targeted by a vigilante group

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The third series of Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology continues. Wayne finds himself in a no-win situation as new clues emerge in the Purcell case

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: A surprise health inspection reveals the cracks in the restaurants foundation, while Carmy goes head to head with Richie. Comedy drama, starring Jeremy Allen White

programme.title: The Pacific

Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific

Jimmy goes to visit his sick father, and quizzes Gillian about his childhood. Meanwhile, Nuckys nerves mount as the election looms, Angela plans her escape, and Rothstein anxiously meets with his solicitor. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi

programme.title: The Perfect Storm (2000)
programme.desc: The skipper of a fishing boat and his crew ignore severe weather warnings and head for a dangerous area of the North Atlantic in search of the last lucrative catch of the season, but end up fighting for survival in the worst storm of the 20th century. Fact-based disaster drama, with George Clooney, Mark Wahlberg, Diane Lane, John C Reilly and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall (1994)
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwicks period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner

programme.title: The Perfect Storm (2000)

Fact-based disaster drama, with George Clooney, Mark Wahlberg, Diane Lane, John C Reilly and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Oceans Eleven (2001)
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegass biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderberghs crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac

programme.title: Get Out (2017)
programme.desc: After African American photographer Chris and his white girlfriend Rose visit her wealthy parents, he suspects theres more to the locals than meets the eye. Oscar-winning psychological thriller written and directed by Jordan Peele (Us), starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford and Caleb Landry Jones

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: A Star Is Born (2018)
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jacksons alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott

programme.title: The Brutalist (2025)
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbets drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wifes warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke (1967)
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mothers death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearces novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper

programme.title: Lee (2023)
programme.desc: American fashion model-turned-war photographer Lee Miller is determined to document the truth of the Nazi regime, and in spite of the odds stacked against female correspondents, she captures some of the most important images of the Second World War. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Winslet, Andy Samberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Marion Cotillard

programme.title: 28 Years Later (2025)
programme.desc: Decades since the rage virus took hold, the survivors live on a small island. When one of the group leaves on a mission into the mainland, he discovers secrets, wonders, and horrors that have mutated not only the infected but other survivors. Danny Boyles horror thriller sequel, starring Jodie Comer, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ralph Fiennes and Rocco Haynes

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his bosss wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantinos crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennells Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke (1967)
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mothers death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearces novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows (2011)
programme.desc: The detective investigates a series of seemingly unconnected crimes all around the world, and becomes convinced one man is behind them all - the elusive Professor Moriarty. He sets forth on an international journey to bring the evil mastermind to justice, but finds he is dealing with a foe who is his intellectual equal. Action thriller sequel, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Noomi Rapace and Jared Harris

programme.title: Children of Men (2006)
programme.desc: In a future blighted by mass infertility, the human race is one generation from extinction and the world has plunged into chaos. In a totalitarian Britain, a jaded former activist tries to protect the first woman to become pregnant in nearly 20 years. However, a militant underground group plans to use her for its own ends. Thriller, starring Clive Owen, Michael Caine and Julianne Moore

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman (1982)
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation

programme.title: Murders That Shocked the Nation
programme.desc: The presenter explores the case of John Straffen, who killed two young girls in the summer of 1951. He was found to be unfit to plead and committed to Broadmoor Hospital, but during a brief escape from the facility in 1952 he killed again. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

Tonys four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle

programme.desc: The latest recruit to join the team of 37 beefeaters begins his career with some testing exams. Chris must learn the extensive history of the Tower by heart, a word-for-word knowledge which he will be tested on by the governor before being let loose alone on the 100,000 visitors who come to the Tower every week. Plus, chief curator Tracy Borman turns her attention to the time of Henry VIII, when the Tower gained its notorious reputation for imprisonment and execution, revealing the history of Anne Boleyn within the walls

programme.desc: On September 1 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.desc: Examining the hidden signs of alien abduction, from loss of time and bizarre hazy memories to terrifying accounts of alien surgery

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Experts discuss the possibility of advanced alien technology that could allow UFOs to fly at blinding speed or hover effortlessly a few feet above the ground

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to the south-west corner of Wales and one of Britains finest coastal paths to find out why Pembrokeshire feels so English, even though its more than 100 miles from the border. With its numerous castles and a fine cathedral, there are sure signs the Normans stamped their mark over the area. Tonys four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: The latest recruit to join the team of 37 beefeaters begins his career with some testing exams. Chris must learn the extensive history of the Tower by heart, a word-for-word knowledge which he will be tested on by the governor before being let loose alone on the 100,000 visitors who come to the Tower every week. Plus, chief curator Tracy Borman turns her attention to the time of Henry VIII, when the Tower gained its notorious reputation for imprisonment and execution, revealing the history of Anne Boleyn within the walls

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Delving into the mysteries surrounding the death of Elvis Presley in 1977, investigating the theories that he remained alive, secretly, for some time afterwards

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: People reveal details from their past lives as celebrities, while experts investigate evidence that suggests death may not be the end of ones existence

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike and Averys cross-country road trip is interrupted by an unexpected call from home. JF borrows shop space from Mike to restore a 1955 GMC truck - as well as his relationship with his brother

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The Renaissance was a time of great enlightenment throughout Europe, advances were made in both science and the arts. Many paintings have a mysterious common feature, what some would call today a UFO

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: The mystery surrounding a mass produced series of paintings of crying children, a popular artwork in many houses in the 1980s

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the fate of sacred buildings, famous artworks, wildlife, power plants and more. The buildings of the worlds leaders come under attack on a post-apocalyptic planet, and the US Presidents dog must quickly learn the ways of the wild

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: The startling images captured by satellites of a structure in North Korea that may be sinister evidence of a looming nuclear threat

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitlers government was firmly in the saddle in October 1934 and its anti-Jewish policy was supported by millions of Germans. Openly and publicly, Jews were discriminated against, disenfranchised, and persecuted. The indifference of many countries towards those Jewish refugees forced to leave Germany was evident

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Exploring how Lawrence of Arabia used guerilla warfare against the Ottoman Empires railways. Plus, two secrets hidden under New Yorks Grand Central Terminal - President Roosevelts personal train that brought him secretly into the city, and a M42 generator that it is claimed Nazi spies tried to destroy

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.sub-title: Lost and Confused: Sharp Top Mountain B25 Crash
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates how thousands of soldiers during the Second World War died in catastrophic air accidents and tragic training crashes. In the first edition, he tries to uncover what happened on board a B-25 Mitchell Bomber that crashed into Sharp Top mountain in Virginia in 1943, resulting in the deaths of five people

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with a look at a 1943 crash in Gibraltar, which killed General Wladyslaw Sikorski, the Prime Minister of Polands London-based government. Presenter Garth Barnard investigates many of the unanswered questions from the tragedy, including why the pilot was wearing a life jacket and why many of the bodies believed to be on the plane were never found, and asks whether the accident could have actually been an assassination

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.sub-title: Australias Worst Air Crash - Bakers Creek
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates the Bakers Creek aviation disaster in Australia in 1943, when 40 American servicemen were killed when their B-17 bomber aircraft crashed

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: How two cousins produced photographs of fairies that enchanted the world, until decades later, their trick was exposed

programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath heads to Scotland, learning about a terrifying family of cannibals who used to prey upon weary travellers, and the prehistoric origins of the Loch Ness monster

Meanwhile, across the wilderness, IRT veteran Todd Dewey takes on a route hes never seen before - forcing him out of his truck and into a fight against the elements

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Muskie Creek convoy struggles to recover from disaster after an ice bridge collapses beneath Lisas truck, tipping her off the road. Scooter launches an unorthodox plan to get them back on track, while Todd races out of the wilderness on a deadline

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A rare copy of Seven Years in Tibet signed by author Heinrich Harrer turns up at the shop, and Corey teams up with Chumlee to check out a Three Stooges promotional projector

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: As the regulars seek more bargains, Rene laughs all the way to the bank, and Darrell reels in a hoard of goodies

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi rescues a loose dog from oncoming traffic in Riverside, California, Darrells unit confirms his Magic Bullet Theory, and Kennys locker contains a shiny score

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits Happisburgh in Norfolk, where the discovery of rare artefacts provides evidence of the earliest human occupation in Britain, challenging the conventional belief that mankind would not have been able to survive in northern Europe one million years ago. She also joins a team at Forteviot in Scotland, where the uncovering of a Bronze Age grave holds a big surprise

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: When the team finds an artefact on Lot 8 that may date to medieval times, it leads them to another, massive discovery

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From Nazi bunkers buried in sand and a supernova caught on camera. These discoveries prove historys blasts from the past can shake our world today

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter and one-time Rolls Royce engineer fulfils a lifetimes ambition to visit the monuments of Ancient Egypt in a bid to understand how it could have been possible to produce such wonders of the ancient world 4,500 years ago. An expert guide is on hand to lay out the mainstream thinking and act as the perfect foil for Bradley and his theories

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter dives deeper into Egypts mysteries, exploring the Great Sphinx and the underground Serapeum with its precision-cut granite sarcophagi, questioning their purpose and links to the pyramid enigma. Travelling south, he visits the intricately designed Dendera Temple, where hieroglyphs and imagery hint at possible extraterrestrial connections. He concludes at the sprawling Karnak temple complex, marvelling at its monumental engineering, sphinx-lined avenues, and Hatshepsuts towering obelisk - wondering whether its simply a monument or a channel for cosmic energy

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter sets out to uncover the mysteries of King Tutankhamun. Along the way, he encounters the enigmatic Alien King Akhenaten and his wife, Nefertiti. Sailing down the Nile, he investigates how the Ancient Egyptians transported enormous stone blocks for their architectural marvels, including the 700-ton Colossi of Memnon. His quest then leads him into the Valley of the Kings, where he discovers the resting places of Akhenaten and King Tuts successor, Horemheb - before finally coming face to face with the mummy of the Boy King himself

programme.desc: Brothers Mike and Robbie Wolfe revisit the picking grandpa they never had on his five-acre Kansas empire. They then they head to Pennsylvania for a dizzying joyride

He and his team have just 12 weeks to search the wrecks below the turbulent waves of the Death Coast make diving impossible

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his exploration of the archipelago with a look at how, despite their proximity, no two of the 19 islands are the same. He also uncovers evidence that evolution on Galapagos is occurring faster than Charles Darwin could ever have imagined, and encounters Lonesome George, the last remaining giant Pinta Island tortoise, who died just a few weeks after filming in June 2012

programme.title: Reef Wrecks
programme.desc: From opportunistic pirate ships, to well-armed navy vessels, the history of Mexicos Yucatan Peninsula is explored

programme.title: Enter the Dragon (1973)
programme.desc: A powerful crime kingpin hosts a martial arts tournament on his island lair. A former Shaolin monk is recruited by an intelligence agency to enter the tournament and expose the crime lords opium and slavery rings. He finds himself fighting for his life alongside two Vietnam veterans who are both fleeing their own enemies. Thriller, starring Bruce Lee, John Saxon, Jim Kelly and Kien Shih

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varleys comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

Leonidas, fearless king of Sparta, leads 300 of his finest warriors into battle against the vast invading armies of the ruler of the Persian empire. As the outnumbered Spartans fight for their country, his queen, Gorgo, tries to rally support for her husband at home. Fantasy action adventure based on Frank Miller and Lynn Varleys comic-book series, starring Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham and Rodrigo Santoro

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.title: Pitch Black (2000)
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: White Elephant (2022)
programme.desc: An ex-Marine enforcer must battle his conscience and code of honour when he is forced to work for the Mob. Action thriller directed by Jesse V Johnson, starring Bruce Willis, Olga Kurylenko, John Malkovich and Michael Rooker

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Mechanic (2011)
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teachers son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney
